reviews.review_description:
It does what it says but it runs as an app in the background.. 
It's like when you pause the game that's all the apps you can use settings and the web browser
But it's only 99 cents..

I like having my ceiling removed and making it a sky line window. Really makes it  a cool experience.

An idea I had, what if you had local weather added? Individuals put their location for weather. Then if it's rainy it will be cloudy with rain drops. Etc. Can have a few weather modes to make it simpler code wise;) would be a cool way to check the weather having it actually be in your living room. But thays future plans haha, I like the app so far!!

Really neat idea, works as advertised, the ceiling in your room disappears and it feels like your room is placed somewhere in the nature. 😮
Looking forward to possible future updates to this app, more environments (northern lights on a night sky, pretty please? 😀) etc.
Nice idea, some improvement was suggested for the last star it should be more complete. Good Work.
Love this, had a few issues by the dev assisted and I was able to use as advertised. Can’t wait to see what new additions can be made.
